name: Banana Bread Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Uncooked Quick Oats (Note: Do NOT use instant packets for the oatmeal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mashed bananas and lemon juice, blending well.
2. Add all of the other ingredients, blending until smooth.
3. Serve immediately. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Fresh or dried fruit, chocolate wafers, pound cake cubes, vanilla wafers.
